TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Sakur, title = Sakur, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sakur} }

S.FORM: Sakur Itiniay i Hualien Cen no Hualien ko Sakur a niyaro', 616 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 1,699 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 39% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 658 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 61% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 1,041 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis25%, śííŚ•áśčČťõÖśóŹ8%, Bunun1%, Tayal1%, Truku3%, roma1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: sako~u~ur itiniaj i ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn ¶…ôn no~u ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn ko~u sako~u~ur a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *,*** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u amis**%, ******%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, taja…ĺ*%, tro~u~uko~u~u*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u pi ¶o~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģan i nijaro~u °.
S.FORM: Sakur Itiniay i Hualien Cen no Hualien ko Sakur a niyaro', 616 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 1,699 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 39% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 658 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 61% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 1,041 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis25%, śííŚ•áśčČťõÖśóŹ8%, Bunun1%, Tayal1%, Truku3%, roma1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: sako~u~ur itiniaj i ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn ¶…ôn no~u ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn ko~u sako~u~ur a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *,*** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u amis**%, ******%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, taja…ĺ*%, tro~u~uko~u~u*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u pi ¶o~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģan i nijaro~u °.
